## Summary

(Summarize the changes that have been made to the platform)

## Checklist

- [ ] I fixed|updated|added unit tests and integration tests for each feature (if applicable).
- [ ] No error nor warning in the console.
- [ ] I joined a screenshot of developed feature (if applicable).
- [ ] For a substantial new method, pipeline, GUI, or toolbox-like contribution,
      I linked the issue or discussion that explains why this should be merged
      into FieldTrip rather than maintained as a separate FieldTrip extension.
- [ ] I documented any new dependencies, compiled code, large data files,
      licensing constraints, and the expected long-term maintainer or contact
      person.
